title: Save Game & Serialization
description: Understand USaveGame classes, variable serialization, and save/load file pipelines in Unreal Engine.
learningObjectives: Define custom save variables inside a USaveGame subclass
Serialize character transforms and stats into dynamic variables
Write and read save files using the Gameplay Statics saving API

sections.title: Save Game Serialization
sections.content: Unreal provides the `USaveGame` class to serialize object state variables into binary files (.sav). Reflected properties inside `USaveGame` are automatically serialized when you call the saving API, converting runtime structures into disk-persistent variables that survive process termination.

sections.title: Saving Player Coordinates
